title: Repository navigation state cleanup
summary: Repository pages no longer show snapshot-version warnings or dirty-state pills in the header, tabs have a clearer active state, and the main app sidebar stays fixed while page content scrolls.
userVisibleChange: The repository page header is less noisy, selected tabs are easier to see, and the left sidebar remains available while scrolling down long repository pages.

risks.title: Fixed sidebar could affect narrow desktop widths
risks.mitigation: Kept the fixed behavior behind the existing md breakpoint and verified the repository page in a browser after scrolling.

timeline.title: Scoped earlier-version warning
timeline.summary: Limited the amber earlier-version notice to snapshot routes instead of showing it on repository pages.

timeline.title: Simplified repository header state
timeline.summary: Removed the clean/dirty repository pill from the repository header to avoid exposing transient working-tree state there.

timeline.title: Improved tab active state
timeline.summary: Used a stronger line-tab selected surface based on the shadcn Tabs line pattern so selected tabs are visually obvious.

timeline.title: Fixed desktop sidebar
timeline.summary: Made the primary sidebar fixed at desktop sizes and offset the app content by the sidebar width.

timeline.title: Ran automated and browser checks
timeline.summary: Verified with UI build, Go tests, Playwright repository snapshot, tab switching, and scrolled sidebar screenshot.

decisions.title: Keep warning route-specific
decisions.rationale: The earlier-version notice is meaningful when inspecting snapshots, but it is confusing on repository overview pages where users expect current repository metadata.

decisions.title: Avoid repository dirty/clean header state
decisions.rationale: The working-tree state can change while development is in progress and is too noisy for the repository overview header.

decisions.title: Mirror shadcn line tabs without adding a dependency
decisions.rationale: The project does not include a Tabs component or Radix Tabs dependency, so the existing accessible tab buttons now use the same active-state ideas locally.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit, vite build, and copy-dist completed successfully from ui/.
Verified repository page no longer shows Dirty or earlier-version text; clicked Snapshots tab; captured active-tab and scrolled-sidebar screenshots.

artifacts.description: Repository page selected tab active-state verification screenshot
Repository page scrolled with fixed left sidebar verification screenshot
